creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: libsndfile doesn't recieve much development these days and for the last years pretty much everything has gone into cmake rather than autotools hence my decision to change it (and the documentation hasn't recieved updates in years). I can fix sqllite dep and seeing that many projects are moving away from cmake I also think its valuable to have the cmake config files available as many users appears to move away from autotools. This also seems to the trend looking at other package repos fwiw.
